rationale: The cited paper’s core question—how assortment and distance affect store choice—closely matches key constructs in the citing paper (endogenous assortment, consumer travel costs, and channel choice in online–offline competition). With this strong topical overlap and a verified DOI reference match (10.1509/jmkr.46.2.176), the citation is plausibly foundational/mechanism-relevant rather than clearly incidental.
